{"decision":"warn","decision_source":"pre_claim_intake","detail":"ac #4 requires `cd cli \u0026\u0026 go test ./internal/bead/... ./internal/bead/internal/lifecycle/... ./internal/server/...` to pass, but ./internal/server/... has pre-existing failures unrelated to this move: The move itself (watcher.go -\u003e internal/lifecycle/watcher_hub.go) is narrowly scoped and well specified with file:line evidence, named tests, and clear AC. However, two independent prior attempts (2026-07-08) both report the same outcome: the relocation compiles and its own focused tests (TestWatcherHub_SubscribeLifecycle, TestWatcherHub_PropagatesFactoryErrors) pass, but AC #4's full test command (`.../internal/server/...`) and AC #5 (`lefthook run pre-commit`) fail due to pre-existing, unrelated failures in cli/internal/server (doctor flag redefined: unjam; git-repo fixture errors; land_coordinator_test.go; workers_gates_test.go). CLAUDE.md mandates all tests pass before commit, so this is not a prose/AC wording issue narrowable via rewrite — it is a hidden external blocker (broken unrelated tests elsewhere in the repo) that a correctly-scoped implementation of this bead cannot resolve on its own without expanding scope well beyond the stated NON-SCOPE boundaries.","fingerprint":"bef8f535f6c13475d7d17036e4e001c428767ab1ccdf6fb55f22d3b50263a690","policy_mode":"warn-only","reason":"readiness_best_effort","rule_id":"pre_claim_intake.readiness_best_effort","suggested_action":"revise the rewrite so it preserves every explicit commitment","warning_fingerprint":"bef8f535f6c13475d7d17036e4e001c428767ab1ccdf6fb55f22d3b50263a690"}

status=blocked
reason=Bash tool cannot launch in this execution worktree — every invocation fails with "ENOSPC: no space left on device, mkdir '/tmp/claude-501/-Users-erik-Projects--ddx-exec-wt--execute-bead-wt-ddx-69591a68-20260708T144631-7162fe1e'" before any command runs (confirmed with a no-op `true` command). The host's /tmp (or the filesystem backing it) is out of space, so no shell command — git add/commit, go test, lefthook run pre-commit — can execute from this session. This is an external, machine-level blocker unrelated to the bead's code change (moving cli/internal/bead/watcher.go into cli/internal/bead/internal/lifecycle/); it must be cleared by freeing disk space on the host running this worktree before the bead can be re-attempted. No source edits were made and nothing was committed.
suggested_action=recheck the external blocker and move status to open when cleared

no_changes
